news_title: zSpace Launches New Industrial Robotics Applications for Training, Maintenance, and Operations
summary: zSpace (NASDAQ: ZSPC)has launched three new industrial robotics applications focused on training, maintenance, and operations. The applications provide immersive augmented reality simulations for education and workforce development in automation-driven industries.The suite includes:Industrial Robotics Trainingfor foundational systems and core principles,Industrial Robotics Maintenancefor diagnostic and repair procedures, andIndustrial Robotics Operationsfor robotic welding and spray painting systems programming.The applications run on zSpace's headset-free AR/VR laptops featuring built-in head tracking and stylus control, allowing users to manipulate virtual robotic components in a realistic, risk-free environment.
